name: Fried Tomatoes with Creamy Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the ends from the tomatoes and cut them in half.
2. Season the tomatoes to taste.
3. Dredge the tomatoes in flour.
4. Brown the tomatoes on both sides in bacon drippings over medium heat, turning occasionally until golden brown.
5. Transfer the tomatoes to a hot serving platter.
6. In the same pan, blend 1 tablespoon of flour into the drippings using a wooden spoon or spatula.
7. Gradually add milk (or skim milk) while continuously stirring to avoid lumps.
8. Cook the mixture over medium-low heat until it thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
9. Season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
10. Pour the creamy gravy over the fried tomatoes on the platter.
Note: If you prefer to reduce calories and fat, substitute milk for skim milk in this recipe. However, there is no suitable replacement for bacon drippings when making this dish.
